channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fire near Paris forces evacuations, disrupts trains and highway
item.description: A fire is burning in the historic Fontainebleau forest south of Paris, prompting evacuations and disrupting traffic.

item.title: Actor Sam Neill, star of 'Jurassic Park,' dies at age 78
item.description: Sam Neill, known for his roles in the Jurassic Park films and Peaky Blinders, has died, his official social media account confirmed.

item.title: Speedboat capsizes off southern Vietnam, killing 15 tourists
item.description: A witness described seeing passengers submerged by waves while waving for help.

item.title: WATCH: Bison attacks tourist at Yellowstone Park
item.description: A grandfather and his grandson were walking when a bison charged, throwing the man at least eight feet into the air.
